data.title: Planet Financial Group appoints Rob Parsley as Sr. VP, Non-Agency Sales (NMLS ID#249640) after his 3-decade career.
data.description: In an announcement made on October 3, 2025, in Meriden, Connecticut, Planet Financial Group appointed Rob Parsley with NMLS ID#249640 as the new Senior Vice President for Non-Agency Sales. Parsley, a veteran with over 30 years of experience, has a track record of leading organizations through dynamic market shifts by crafting effective growth plans.

data.title: California Greens initiative promotes immune health for families during school season. Gardy supports year-long wellness.
data.description: As September approaches, the likelihood of falling ill increases. Gardy steps in to assist kids and families in maintaining wellness throughout the year. In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on October 3, 2025, it was highlighted that maintaining good health is closely tied to having a robust immune system, particularly crucial during the back-to-school period.

data.title: Leo Cancer Care to integrate TibaRay Linacs into Grace Photon Therapy; orders advanced linacs for upgrade option.
data.description: In Madison, Wisconsin, on October 3, 2025, Leo Cancer Care revealed plans to acquire TibaRay's state-of-the-art linear accelerators for potential integration with their Grace photon therapy platform. This upgrade option will be assessed alongside the company's ongoing research and development efforts.

data.title: A.D. Henderson University School and FAU High ranked No. 2 in the country in Niche 2026 rankings. Boca Raton, Fla.
data.description: A.D. Henderson University School and Florida Atlantic University High School, located in Boca Raton, Florida, have achieved remarkable success by securing the No. 2 position in the nation according to Niche's 2026 rankings. The FAU Lab Schools were recognized as the top performers in both the country and the state, attesting to their outstanding academic quality and achievement. This recognition further solidifies their reputation and emphasizes the exceptional education they offer.

data.title: Cosmos aims for $13.42 by October 2025, predicts technical indicators, despite current dip to $4.06 level.
data.description: The current price prediction for ATOM displays conflicting signals, as there is a short-term bearish pressure around $4.06. However, the medium-term Cosmos forecast indicates an upward trend, with a target of $13.42 according to technical analysis.

data.title: Apple removes ICEBlock app under pressure from Trump admin following legal threats. App alerts users to nearby immigration agents.
data.description: Officials from the Trump administration have issued multiple legal warnings concerning ICEBlock, a widely-used application that enables users to notify others about the proximity of immigration agents.

data.title: Veho opens a new 150,000 sq ft hub in Atlanta, boosting e-commerce delivery by 5x. Fastest-growing parcel platform in U.S.
data.description: An announcement made on October 3, 2025 revealed that Veho, a leading parcel delivery platform in the U.S., has inaugurated a new regional distribution center in Atlanta. This facility spans 150,000 square feet and signifies a substantial expansion for the company. With this development, Veho will have the capacity to handle five times the number of e-commerce parcels compared to its previous capabilities. The expansion emphasizes Veho's dedication to enhancing its services and catering to the growing demands of online retail, solidifying its position as one of the top players in the market.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash expected to rally to $650-700 by November 2025, despite short-term resistance near $560-565. Bullish indicators.
data.description: Based on technical indicators, analysts predict that the price of BCH will reach a range of $650-700 by November 2025, showing bullish momentum. However, consensus among analysts suggests that there may be a period of near-term weakness, with the price expected to hover around $560-565.

data.title: Franklin Street Properties Corp. announced quarterly dividend of $0.01 per share, payable on November 6, 2025.
data.description: In Wakefield, Massachusetts, Franklin Street Properties Corp. (NYSE American: FSP) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.01 per share of common stock for July 1, 2025, through September 30, 2025. The dividend will be paid on November 6, 2025, to stockholders of record as of October 17, 2025. For more information about FSP, including this press release, visit www.fspreit.com. Updates and news about the company are regularly posted online.

data.title: Reddit stock rebounds after concerns over ChatGPT citing less often dismissed by analysts.
data.description: According to Reddit stock analysts, they are not worried about a recent report stating that ChatGPT is referencing Reddit less frequently. The stock for Reddit saw an improvement, with analysts dismissing the concerns related to ChatGPT. This information was published by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Stock market hits new highs led by AI, despite Tesla reversing lower post record deliveries.
data.description: The stock market surged to reach new record highs, driven by artificial intelligence (AI) companies. Despite achieving a milestone in deliveries, Tesla experienced a decline in its stock performance. This weekly review highlights the stock market's rally and AI's prominent role in this growth, while also noting Tesla's reversal in the market.

data.title: Palantir stock dropped due to flawed Army network development with Anduril, signaling security issues.
data.description: Palantir's stock experienced a decline following reports of security issues within an Army communications network being jointly developed by the software company and Anduril. The post on Investor's Business Daily stated that the stock drop was attributed to this development.
